productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Silver Heels
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. Wear it with skirts or sarees, and look classy either way. Heel: 4" Upper Synthetic leather straps with blingy print on the forefoot straps Buckle closure on the backfoot strap Synthetic leather footbed Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Pencil heel with a rubber patch Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
